retrieved_result: Understanding Leukoplakia Understanding Leukoplakia Symptoms Causes Diagnosis Treatment Prevention Outlook What is leukoplakia? Leukoplakia is a condition in which thick, white patches form on your tongue and the lining of your mouth. Smoking is the most common cause. But other irritants can result in this condition as well.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses a medical condition (leukoplakia) and contains no information about DIY room decoration ideas; it is not relevant to the query.
